notes: Two initial repository-relative command attempts failed before their corrected commands; the successful fingerprint still preceded the baseline, and the corrected baseline preceded every edit.

Both sealed dry-runs reported zero pending generation/update work but skipped executable examples because the compiled specification was not on the runner classpath. The launcher JAR at the selected path changed after sealing from SHA-256 8522dc72... to 0a6affa0.... The sealed pre-baseline fingerprint remains valid provenance; independent replay passed with the later binary but is not a bit-identical executable replay.
The parent committed the implementation after sealing. The sealed patch is byte-identical to the base-to-implementation-commit patch.
